task: improve tour agent: stricter real price, dates, nights and old links checks
requirements: Keep production safe. Do not publish production workflow directly from v41.
Do not create duplicate VAi Quality Gate v31 nodes.
There must be exactly one VAi Quality Gate v31 in production workflow.
Every future production publish must pass static JSON validation.
Every future production publish must pass n8n import.
Every future production publish must pass n8n execute.
Every future production publish must pass Google Sheets output check.
Every future production publish must pass final v29 check.
Improve real price checks: empty price, unrealistic price, missing source_url or search-only URL must not be treated as confirmed.
Improve price confidence: confirmed is allowed only when source_url and price evidence are present.
Improve dates and nights checks: requested month, dates and number of nights must match the user request.
Improve old link checks: empty, stale, generic search or suspicious source_url must lower score and confidence.
Improve calm hotel logic: ant-farm, noisy family and overloaded resort signals must lower score.
Rejected or risky variants must have reject_reason and must not be shown as reliable TOP recommendations.
Task text must be preserved in builder/v41/status.json and builder/v41/specs.

autotests.input: Turkey July up to 175000 for two adults 4-5 stars not ant-farm
expected: suspicious price is not reliable TOP
price_confidence is confirmed only with evidence

autotests.input: Turkey August up to 350000 for two adults 7 nights
quiet hotel, no old links, no generic search pages

expected: exactly one VAi Quality Gate v31
production publish only after final v29 OK

safety_rules: v41.1 does not call v37 ForceRebuild
v41.1 does not duplicate VAi Quality Gate v31
